assertionsSummary.note: VAL-AUTOPILOT-010/011/012/020/021/022/023 validated via unit tests; VAL-AUTOPILOT-030+ and VAL-CROSS-001 belong to future milestones

appliedUpdates.description: Paperclip runs in Docker on port 13100 (not 3100). Updated user-testing.md to reflect actual port mapping.
Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for browser and API surfaces with concurrency guidance (max 2 browser, max 3 API).

notes: All 7 assertions for product-loop (VAL-AUTOPILOT-010 through VAL-AUTOPILOT-023) are implemented and tested via the plugin's unit test suite (104 tests passed). The assertions cover research cycles, idea generation/scoring/duplication, swipe review (Pass/Maybe/Yes/Now), and preference model updates. The delivery-control, advanced-execution, closed-loop-operations, and integrated-experience milestones still need validation - those assertions (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 through VAL-CROSS-001) remain pending and belong to future user-testing validator runs.
